description_long: This storage box is a robust, rectangular container constructed from thick, brown material resembling heavy-duty cardboard or compressed fiberboard. The box features three horizontal bands or slats on each side, reinforced by two wide vertical strips that provide structural support and possibly aid in stacking. The top is flat with two narrow slots, suggesting a removable or lift-off lid design. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, with no visible handles, locks, or labeling. Its utilitarian design and sturdy build make it suitable for storing or transporting goods in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or sidewalks.
description: A sturdy, brown rectangular storage box with reinforced vertical and horizontal bands and a flat, slotted removable lid. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible handles or labeling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the slotted lid and two wide vertical support strips, with three horizontal bands visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same vertical strips and horizontal bands, but the lid slots are not visible from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the slotted lid and vertical strips, but no distinguishing marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with vertical and horizontal reinforcements and no lid slots visible.
